authorization_phrase: Authorize s19-d1 independent-universe weekly relative-strength rotation Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.

binding_caveats.edge_not_inherited: The s18 edge (OOS +$210/trade, thin + recently-weak with F5 negative) is NOT inherited. The s19 edge is re-proven from scratch on the independent universe at P6 IS (K1/K2). A null/negative s19 = the s18 result was universe-specific; an accepted, informative outcome.
binding_caveats.stop_before_SEAL_rule: Stop before SEAL if a fuller pre-SEAL K9 check shows OOS < 50/y. [At later phases] terminal if s19 P6 IS edge negative/zero, K13 <3/5, or P10 OOS K9 <50/y -- NOT rescued by tuning (a tune = not a replication). Here the K9 pre-SEAL gate PASSES; the EDGE is the open gate.

replication_of_s18.binding_question: Does the s18 edge GENERALIZE to an independent universe, or was it a single-universe artifact? (LESSON_S18_D1_004)
replication_of_s18.statement: Identical locked s18 mechanic (126-21 / R=5 / top-8 / long-only / relative-rank exit / $100k / split_only); ONLY the universe differs. No parameter changed/searched/tuned. s18 frozen/untouched. The edge is NOT inherited -- re-proven on the independent universe at s19 P6 IS / P6.7 K13 / P10 OOS.

NOT a Tier-N SEAL. The EDGE is re-proven from scratch at s19 P6 IS (not inherited).
